overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial urban district. The player moves under elevated highways past neon signs, crosses a street, and continues along a covered walkway while a flying vehicle passes overhead. The scene features futuristic industrial architecture with concrete structures, large satellite dishes, and prominent neon advertising.

agents.ego_description: walking under concrete overpass and turning right toward industrial area with large satellite dishes

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars
large white satellite dish arrays visible in the distance
tall cylindrical industrial building with metallic exterior
blue and red illuminated sign for CHOOH2 fuel

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in an industrial district. The camera moves forward while turning right, revealing large satellite dishes and industrial towers in the distance. A CHOOH2 fuel sign is visible on the right side as the player navigates the sheltered area.

agents.ego_description: walking under elevated highway past glowing neon advertisement signs

entered.detail: multiple pink neon signs reading WATSON WHORE mounted on the overpass
elevated highway structure casting shadows over the street

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the highway overpass, the scene is dominated by bright pink neon signs advertising WATSON WHORE. The lighting becomes mixed with natural sunlight and artificial neon glow. Sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road as the player continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street crossing with yellow crosswalk

events.description: stepping onto yellow striped crosswalk to cross the wide industrial street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide industrial street at the yellow striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
large industrial building with complex network of red and silver pipes

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into open sunlight to cross a wide street marked with yellow stripes. Industrial buildings with complex piping systems line the right side. A few pedestrians cross in the opposite direction while sparse traffic moves along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: flying vehicle appears in the sky overhead from the left

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk next to industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing a yellow plaid shirt

entered.detail: concrete pedestrian path sheltered under the elevated highway structure
low dark industrial building with large ventilation grates
tall vertical illuminated CHOOH2 sign on building facade
metal guardrail separating walkway from the road
futuristic aerial vehicle with glowing blue thrusters entering from the left

segments.scene_description: The player turns onto a covered walkway running alongside the road, sheltered under the elevated highway. An industrial building with ventilation grates and a vertical CHOOH2 sign dominates the left side. Near the end of the segment, a flying vehicle enters the frame from the left, hovering in the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with flying vehicle passing overhead

events.description: flying vehicle passes directly overhead moving from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing along walkway while observing the flying vehicle passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The flying vehicle continues its trajectory across the sky, passing directly overhead and moving toward the right side of the frame. The player maintains a steady pace along the covered walkway, with the industrial building and highway structure remaining constant in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into the bright, open sunlight of a futuristic industrial street. It begins under a massive highway structure, moving forward and turning right to reveal distant satellite dishes and industrial towers alongside a CHOOH2 fuel sign. As the camera pushes deeper into the underpass, the environment shifts into a glow of bright pink neon advertising for Watson Whore, blending artificial light with filtered sunlight. The scene then opens as the player emerges from the cover of the overpass to cross a wide, yellow-striped street. Finally, the view expands to show pedestrians and sparse traffic moving past industrial buildings characterized by complex piping systems under a clear sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a sheltered industrial corridor as a futuristic vehicle passes overhead. It begins with the camera turning onto a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving past an industrial building characterized by ventilation grates and a prominent vertical CHOOH2 sign. As the player maintains a steady pace, a flying vehicle enters the frame from the left and begins to hover in the sky. The scene then shifts as the vehicle continues its trajectory, gliding directly overhead and moving toward the right side of the frame. The camera continues forward, keeping the concrete highway structures and industrial architecture as a constant backdrop until the vehicle disappears from view.
